servinfo.title: Rear Brake Adjuster and Brake Shoe Lever Inspection

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Rear Brake Shoe Removal and Installation:Drum Brake Model

item.ptxt: Check ratchet of brake adjuster (1) assembly for wear or damage.
Check shoe return springs, anti rattle spring, and hold down spring for damage, corrosion and weakening.
Check for smooth movement of brake lever (2) along shoe rim.

servinfo.ptxt: If check result is not OK, repair or replace brake adjuster and/or brake shoe lever.
